column2: ... you're the first living things to make it this far in a while.
Does that you mean you think we can go further?
It's not impossible. If you can make it out of the exhaust
pipe, you have a good chance.
If you plan to make it any farther, you need to make use
of the bottled pulp laying around.
Press the * button and navigate your Inventory.
Pulp..?
That purple stuff laying around when you finish off a monster.
You've noticed they're not quite like the above-ground animals, right?
Pulp is the inner lining under their flesh. Leave the bits for long enough
and the entire monster will pull back together.
So it replicates and melds organic tissue?
That's certainly one way to put it.
Be on your way. And here, something for the road.
Do you need another bottle of pulp? Here.
Still here? Best you move on soon.
I only had the one extra potion. I'll use the rest of this to pull my
body back together.
If I don't try, who will?
Without a warrior, it's a commendable achievement.
The ENGINE is tuned to you. Best to avoid too many battles
or else you'll need some more pulp potions.
Gee, thanks. Got any more cryptic anecdotes?
None that'll serve you. Maybe be wary of the monster at the end
of the exhaust pipe. It's highly responsive to healing magic.
That's workable. Thank you.
